keynotes.text: color="#800000">BARYTA IODATA Iodide of Baryta Acts on the lymphatic system, increased leucocytosis. Quinsy. Indurated glands, especially tonsils and breasts. Strumous ophthalmia, with tumefaction of cervical glands and stunted growth. Tumors.
Baryt. iod. has been used empirically, especially in cases of glandular enlargement and new growths, on indications suggested by its two elements. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main

generalities.text: Clinical: Breast, cancer of; Cancer; Glands, enlargement of; Tumours
